title: pseudoeriocoma multinodis
side_effects: Pseudoeriocoma multinodis can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and increased heart rate due to its toxic compounds. Ingesting the plant's leaves or stems can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea. Improper use of Pseudoeriocoma multinodis may also trigger respiratory problems, such as coughing and shortness of breath, in sensitive individuals. If not handled correctly, the plant's sap can cause eye irritation and redness.
